text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from training, we stop by the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, a raffle... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's weird, I'm sure I had a ticket in my pocket...
Is it in my bag, then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan starts fumbling around, checking
her pockets.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's in my phone case! I bought a new one for
New Year's! I just slipped it between the case and
my phone, and—whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! My phooooone!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's a little cracked...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Nooo...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: U-um... Do you wanna try the raffle?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: All right! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give the lever a powerful spin on Tosen Jordan's
behalf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap! That's amazing, Trainer! You got the
grand prize!
choice_data_list: Looks like it was worth getting the ticket out!
Looks like it was worth getting the ticket out!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again! Maybe we got lucky
because my phone broke!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: My phone... broke...
choice_data_list: For the grand prize! What a trade!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's a coupon for a hot spring getaway, right?
Hehe, wonder who I should take...
choice_data_list: You have plenty of friends to pick from.
You have plenty of friends to pick from.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Right?! How am I supposed to choose just one
person? I want to go with everyone, but I'm
broke!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should just sell the tickets and take
everyone to karaoke...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was just thinking about how you're the
one who actually won.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like there's ages left before it expires,
anyway. Guess I'll take my sweet time to think
about who to bring.
choice_data_list:
Well, I hope you have a good time when you
do!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're really dumb too. You should be making a
case for yourself right now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You could say it's only fair because you won it or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, that looks delicious!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like them? I love them!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Is that right? Glad to hear it! Here's your prize!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. All right, a carrot hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I hate it when you give me that face... Like you're
treating me like I'm a little kid. Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but her tail is up and wagging
quickly. It looks like she's delighted to have won
first prize.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Nicely done! Look, your trainer got the
second prize!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Trainer!
choice_data_list: It's a whole cardboard box full of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Awesome, we can eat ourselves sick!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Who should I call?! City, of course. And Palmer
and Helios—all the regulars! Oh, I should hook
Tickezo up too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ohh, this is gonna be so much fun!
choice_data_list: I'm glad you're feeling better now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That's just like you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Here, give me your hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She places a single carrot in my palm.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...That's your share. Don't waste it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she was nice enough to give me a carrot, I
decide to cook it up and eat it within the day.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: A single carrot...
choice_data_list: Not the best, but... it's something.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's whatever. If I had tried, I probably wouldn't
have gotten anything, so...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't forget your prize!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's in this bag? ...Wait, carrot chips?
choice_data_list: I made them with the carrot from earlier.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...You did?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, oh my gosh, they're all totally different
sizes. C'mon, at least make them match.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll take 'em.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Forget about it. I wonder if I can get my phone
fixed.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I think there was some insurance or something...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the shopping district with a dispirited
Tosen Jordan.
